name: single_radius_v3
_doc: Canonical U-arch specified by RADIUS (arch_radius_mm) instead of width+height. arch_radius_mm=45 expands internally to arch_width_mm=90, arch_height_mm=45 — same result as single_baseline_v3.json but one knob instead of two. Use this style when you think in terms of curvature radius rather than W/H box dimensions.
